# Shortcut Finding Report

The local experiment did not reproduce the public 0.998 test04 result with public default features, raw timestamp only, risky protocol features, no-timestamp public features, or Safe-CAN features. The most likely explanations are data-version mismatch, unreported preprocessing/label protocol, or a different train/test construction in the public result.
